27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling online kaufen - Top Preise | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Two distinct CoreCap product URLs identified: https://www.bike24.de/p1993551.html (CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 - Kupfer 80mm) and https://www.bike24.de/p1993547.html (CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 - schwarz 60mm). Other URLs are either brand pages, tools (CoreControl), or accessories (SteadyValve stickers).
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for CoreCap valves only, excluding: the brand category page (bike24.de/marken/bbb), the CoreControl tool page (p1993586 - this is a valve tool, not a valve), and the SteadyValve damper sticker page (p1993642 - this is an accessory, not a valve product). The two distinct CoreCap product pages are p1993551 and p1993547, representing different color/size variants of BTI-166.

30.evidenceText: All 5 product listings contain product descriptions and specifications but do not include any stock status information (no mentions of 'out of stock', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or 'currently unavailable').
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided evidence text. The 5 product listings (40mm, 60mm, 80mm valve sets, and conversion kit) all contain product descriptions but lack any explicit stock availability indicators.

56.evidenceText: The provided sources reference Clik Valve as a product/valve type and as a filter option on the tube listing page, but do not contain a complete list of specific inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. Source 3 shows tube models (14, 19, 19L) but lists them with AV (Autoventil) valves, not Clik valves. Sources 4-5 describe the Clik valve itself as a valve accessory/component, not tubes that use it.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence does not directly state or list specific inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. While "Clik Valve" appears as a filter option and product name, the actual tube models shown (14, 19, 19L) are listed with traditional AV valves. The Clik valve references in sources 4-5 describe the valve component itself, not inner tubes featuring this valve. Without explicit enumeration of Clik valve-equipped tubes, the count cannot be determined from this evidence.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum fell to 3555.10 USD/T on April 20, 2026, down 0.05% from the previous day.
61.extractionRationale: Extracted 3555.10 from the most recent date available (April 20, 2026). The price is directly stated in USD/T (metric tons) format, matching the required output unit. This is more current than the April 13 reference point in Source 1.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The source states the price as 1,793.99. Assuming this is in cents per pound (standard format for aluminum premiums), conversion to USD/lb yields 17.9399. Confidence is low because the source does not explicitly state the unit of measurement.
